name: Warm Caesar Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes until tender, about 10 minutes.
2. Drain and set aside.
3. Keep warm.
4. Line a large salad bowl or platter with torn lettuce leaves.
5. Pour dressing over potatoes, tossing to coat.
6. Spoon potatoes over lettuce.
7. Top with remaining cheese, bacon, and croutons.
